steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence introduces 'the rate of ______' on the left, then elaborates with 'as light intensity increases, so does the rate...' on the right. The blank needs punctuation that signals elaboration of the preceding noun phrase.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — photosynthesis: runs the elaborating clause directly into the noun phrase with no signal that the right side specifies the left. ✗
  • Choice B — photosynthesis:: a colon after a noun phrase introduces an elaboration or specification, which is exactly what the 'as...so...' construction does here. ✓
  • Choice C — photosynthesis and: a contrasting or transitional connector misrepresents the relationship; the right side does not contrast with the left. ✗
  • Choice D — photosynthesis,: a comma does not clearly signal that what follows specifies the noun phrase; it reads as a loose continuation rather than a precise elaboration. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
